name: Space Invaders
description:
Space Invaders is a fixed shooter where the player controls a laser cannon that moves horizontally across the bottom of the screen. The goal is to defend against waves of descending aliens who are systematically marching toward the bottom of the screen. The aliens move horizontally across the screen, reversing direction when they reach an edge. With each direction change, they also descend a step. As the aliens are defeated, their movement and firing rate progressively increase. 

The aliens fire projectiles at the player's cannon. The player can fire projectiles upwards to eliminate the aliens. The player is protected by several stationary defensive bunkers placed on the screen. These bunkers can be damaged and eventually destroyed by both the player's and the aliens' projectiles. A mysterious unidentified flying object (UFO) or Saucer will occasionally fly across the top of the screen, providing bonus points if hit.

The game ends when the aliens reach the bottom of the screen (i.e., they 'invade') or the player's cannon is destroyed. The player starts with a limited number of lives, and each time the cannon is destroyed, the player loses a life. The game can have multiple waves of aliens to defeat.

controls.arrow_left: Move the player's cannon to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move the player's cannon to the right
controls.space: Fire a projectile from the player's cannon
